partial_progress.details: Phases 1-3 completed. Phase 4 partial (architecture documented). Phases 5-7 blocked on truth lemma infrastructure for TimelineQuot. The existing truth lemma is built for Int; adapting to TimelineQuot requires substantial infrastructure or validity transfer via Cantor isomorphism.

completion_data.completion_summary: Created witness MCS construction primitives and documented modal saturation architecture for TimelineQuot. Fixed pre-existing ChainFMCS.lean build errors. The core sorry (timelineQuot_not_valid_of_neg_consistent) remains blocked on truth lemma infrastructure adaptation from Int to TimelineQuot.
